research_basis: Temporal uses durable execution so workflow state can be recovered and replayed across failures.
Kubernetes controller patterns reconcile desired and actual state.
Argo Workflows supports retry strategies and exit handlers for workflow completion/failure handling.
OpenTelemetry semantic conventions support trace/metric/log correlation.
rules: Stage graph must be ordered and duplicate-free.
Each stage must declare required inputs, gates, receipt, handoff, retryability, and repair routes.
Runtime desired_state and actual_state must reconcile or route to repair.
Retry policy must define retryable and non-retryable failures with bounded attempts.
Exit handlers must always run and emit evidence.
Controller PASS must emit a transition decision.
